fields.title: Member Re-engagement Campaign Q2
fields.description: Win back dormant members with a targeted re-engagement push featuring personalized offers and loyalty rewards.
fields.notes: Focus on members inactive for 60+ days. Tone should feel warm and personal.

childIssues.child_notes: Needs studio photography backdrop for this asset

fields.title: Loyalty Points Double Reward Event
fields.description: Promote our 2Ã— points weekend event to existing members. All channels: in-app, email, and push.
fields.notes: Weekend event: 21-22 June. Assets needed by 18 June EOD.

fields.title: Cross-sell Complementary Products Campaign
fields.description: Targeted cross-sell campaign showing complementary product recommendations to buyers of our top 5 SKUs.
fields.notes: URGENT â€” campaign launches end of month. Homepage banner required first.

childIssues.child_notes: Requires studio product shot with clean white background
Studio needed to photograph actual product bundle

fields.title: Upsell Premium Membership Benefits
fields.description: Showcase the benefits of upgrading to premium membership with a soft-sell visual campaign.
fields.notes: Tone: aspirational but friendly. Not pushy.

fields.title: Win-back Dormant Members â€” June Push
fields.description: Re-engage members who haven't purchased in 90+ days with an exclusive one-time-only return offer.
fields.notes: Segment: members dormant 90 days. Offer: 20% off first return purchase.

fields.title: Natura Body Line Brand Guide
fields.description: Full brand identity guide for the Natura body care private label line including logo, color palette, and typography.
fields.notes: This brand guide will be the master reference for all future Natura packaging and marketing assets.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio needed to photograph physical product swatches and color references

fields.title: Freshkleen Detergent Label Redesign
fields.description: Modernize the label design for Freshkleen detergent range across 3 SKUs to align with refreshed brand look.
fields.notes: Keep the green color family. New label must be print-ready at 300 DPI.

fields.title: Greens & Grains Full Packaging Suite
fields.description: Complete packaging identity for the Greens & Grains health food range: product logo, hang tag, and inner design.
fields.notes: Eco-friendly, natural aesthetic. Earth tones. No plastic-feel visuals.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio shoot needed: real grain/seeds as background for brand photography
Studio product-on-tag photography needed for mockup visual

fields.title: PureOil Cooking Oil Logo Creation
fields.description: Design a fresh, premium logo for the PureOil cooking oil private label. Should feel premium yet accessible.
fields.notes: Color: gold and white preferred. Target market: mid-to-upper income households.

fields.title: SmartHome Brand Identity Kit
fields.description: Create a complete brand identity kit for SmartHome, our home appliance accessories private label.
fields.notes: Modern, tech-forward aesthetic. Navy + silver color family.

fields.title: Eid Al-Fitr Campaign â€” Multi-Platform Posts
fields.description: Create festive Eid content for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok to celebrate with our community and drive engagement.
fields.caption_draft: Selamat Hari Raya Idul Fitri! Rayakan bersama kami dengan penawaran spesial. #EidMubarak #AstronauTS
fields.notes: Festive warm color palette. Brand mascot should appear in all posts.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio needed for ketupat and lantern product arrangement photography

fields.title: Flash Sale 3-Day Countdown Stories
fields.description: Create a 3-part Instagram story series counting down to our biggest flash sale of the quarter.
fields.caption_draft: 3 hari lagi! Flash Sale terbesar tahun ini. Jangan sampai ketinggalan!
fields.notes: Each story must feel like a countdown â€” Day 3, Day 2, Day 1. Bold typography.

fields.title: Brand Anniversary Carousel â€” 5 Years
fields.description: Celebrate our 5th anniversary with a 6-slide Instagram carousel highlighting milestones, team, and future vision.
fields.caption_draft: 5 tahun bersama kalian! Terima kasih sudah menjadi bagian dari perjalanan kami.
fields.notes: Milestone years: 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026. Team photos required on slides 4-5.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio shoot needed: anniversary prop setup with logo, balloons, and brand colors
Studio photo of the team holding '5 Years' sign for the closing slide

fields.title: Product Knowledge LinkedIn Series
fields.description: Educate B2B audience on LinkedIn about our product technology and quality standards.
fields.caption_draft: Did you know? Our products are certified to ISO 9001 standards.
fields.notes: Professional, data-driven look. Infographic style preferred.

fields.title: Weekly Product Feature TikTok
fields.description: Fun, engaging TikTok content showcasing our hero product of the week with trending audio format.
fields.caption_draft: POV: You just discovered the best product ever ðŸ¤© #MustHave #TikTokMadeMeBuyIt
fields.notes: Trending audio format. Fast cuts, text overlays. Under 30 seconds.

fields.title: Ramadan Sale Google Display Network Ads
fields.description: Full set of Google Display Network banners for the Ramadan sale campaign across standard IAB sizes.
fields.notes: IAB standard sizes required. Animation max 15s. File size < 150KB each.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio product shot required: product must be on gold/premium background for Ramadan theme

fields.title: Meta Retargeting â€” Abandoned Cart Recovery
fields.description: Dynamic retargeting creatives for Meta (Facebook & Instagram) targeting users who added to cart but didn't purchase.
fields.notes: Show abandoned product prominently. Clear CTA: 'Complete Your Purchase'. Urgency messaging OK.

fields.title: TikTok Brand Awareness Video Ads
fields.description: TopView and In-Feed video ad creatives for TikTok brand awareness campaign. Need graphic frames, not full video production.
fields.notes: Vertical format 9:16. First 3 seconds must be hook. Studio quality visuals required.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio product shot required on branded set with neon lighting treatment
Studio CTA scene needed: person holding product looking at camera

fields.title: Programmatic Native Ads â€” Q2 Brand Lift
fields.description: Native ad creatives for our programmatic display campaigns. Clean, non-intrusive design that blends with editorial content.
fields.notes: Native format: must look editorial, not promotional. No borders or heavy branding.

fields.title: Multi-Platform Year-End Promo Bundle
fields.description: Display ad bundle for year-end promotion across web, mobile, and in-app. Must be consistent across all placements.
fields.notes: Year-end festive theme. Use brand primary colors. Keep message consistent across all sizes.

fields.title: Ramadan In-Store Poster Series
fields.description: A series of festive posters for in-store display during the Ramadan season across all retail outlets.
fields.notes: Warm gold & deep teal palette. CMYK color mode. 3mm bleed. Print-ready PDF required.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio shoot required: product flatlay with Ramadan decorations (dates, lantern, crescent)

fields.title: New Product Launch Roll-Up Banners
fields.description: Roll-up and X-banner set for the new product launch event at Senayan City, targeting retail and event placement.
fields.notes: High-gloss finish. Display at event booth and store entrance. Logo must be top 20% of the banner.

fields.title: Member Loyalty Program Brochure
fields.description: A4 bi-fold brochure explaining our loyalty program tiers, benefits, and how to earn and redeem points.
fields.notes: 4 pages. Full bleed. Inside pages should feel premium. Photo-heavy. Silk coated stock.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio lifestyle shoot needed: happy member using loyalty card at cashier
Studio QR code lifestyle shot needed: member scanning QR to join program

fields.title: Retail Outlet Wayfinding Signage
fields.description: In-store wayfinding signage set for 10 outlet locations. Entrance, aisle, and shelf-level markers.
fields.notes: Consistent with outlet brand standards. Include floor decals and ceiling hangers.

fields.title: Mid-Year Festival Distribution Flyer
fields.description: DL-sized flyer for mass distribution at festivals, supermarkets, and transit hubs promoting mid-year sale event.
fields.notes: Double-sided. Front: hero offer. Back: terms, QR code, store locator.

fields.title: Natura Body Lotion Bottle Label Redesign
fields.description: Redesign the label for Natura Body Lotion range (250ml & 500ml). Updated branding, improved ingredient hierarchy.
fields.regulatory_info: Halal cert logo required. BPOM registration number must appear front. Net weight on front.
fields.notes: Premium feel. Soft pastel tones. Fragrance name must be legible at small size.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio mockup shoot needed: label applied to actual bottle for approval photography

childIssues.child_title: Back Label â€” Ingredients & Legal (Both Sizes)

fields.title: Freshkleen Detergent Pouch Packaging Redesign
fields.description: Redesign the stand-up pouch packaging for Freshkleen detergent powder in 3 weight variants.
fields.regulatory_info: SNI certification logo. Usage instructions on back. Hazard symbols if required.
fields.notes: Keep the green color family from the current label. Matte finish preferred.

fields.title: Greens & Grains Cereal Box Series
fields.description: Full packaging design for the Greens & Grains muesli cereal line in 3 box sizes. Nature-forward, premium health food feel.
fields.regulatory_info: Nutrition facts panel required (all 3 sizes). Organic certification badge. Expiry date area.
fields.notes: Earthy, natural palette. Illustrative grain/seed elements. Window panel showing product.

childIssues.child_notes: Studio flatlay needed: box surrounded by raw muesli ingredients for packaging reference photography
Studio family lifestyle shot needed: family breakfast table scene with product as hero

fields.title: SmartHome Hair Care Tube Packaging
fields.description: Tube packaging design for SmartHome conditioner range: 3 sizes for standard, travel, and sample use.
fields.regulatory_info: BPOM registration. Halal logo. Ingredient list on back.
fields.notes: Clean, modern look. Navy + silver. Flip-cap closure. Ingredients list must be readable at 6pt.

fields.title: Premium Harvest Gift Tin Design
fields.description: Decorative gift tin packaging design for our Premium Harvest tea gift set. Premium presentation for gifting season.
fields.regulatory_info: Net weight. Country of origin. Best before date area required.
fields.notes: Gold foil emboss effect on lid. Festive but timeless aesthetic. Works for Chinese New Year and Eid gifting.
